entities.description: single hop workflow is a method denoted as ps used to solve sub problems
ps is the specific notation or identifier for the single hop workflow applied to sub problems
the agent is the entity performing the decomposition of the problem and the synthesis of results
complex refers to the problem being decomposed by the agent

relations.description: the single hop workflow is identified by the notation ps in the text
the agent decomposes the complex problem into sub problems
the agent applies the single hop workflow to each sub problem
